info.name: StrongMail Agent Studio API
info.description:
FastAPI wrapper for StrongMail Agent Studio.

Run requests top-to-bottom. `POST /session` saves `session_id` automatically for later requests.

Prerequisites: PostgreSQL, Redis, and GoEmotions model loaded (first startup may take ~30–60s).

Template refresh (`/refresh/*`) additionally requires `STRONGMAIL_PASSWORD`, `DATABASE_URL`, and the extraction pipeline on `PYTHONPATH` (see `paysafe-email-tone-of-voice`). `POST /refresh/template/{name}` saves `job_id` for status and SSE requests.

Tone batch operations (`/tone/batch-*`, `/tone/reevaluate`, `/tone/export`) require `DATABASE_URL` and Redis. Batch jobs use EN/SKRILL context and share the refresh thread pool.

variable.value: Your Skrill password reset — action needed

item.name: 1. Health
item.description: Verify backend dependencies before starting a session.

request.description: Poll connection status for PostgreSQL, Redis, GoEmotions, and ADK. Always returns 200 — read the JSON body for component health.

item.name: 2. Template Discovery
item.description: Load sidebar data: template list, locales, and brands.

request.description: Returns all ACTIVE templates with key counts and summaries.
Distinct lang_local values for the locale selector.
Distinct param_cust_brand values for the brand selector.

item.name: 3. Session
item.description: Create an ADK session for a template + locale + brand. Required before all session-scoped endpoints.

request.description: Creates an ADK session, pre-builds the resolution graph, and returns session_id. Updates the `session_id` collection variable on success.

item.name: 4. Initial State
item.description: Read working copy and preview immediately after session creation.

request.description: Returns all Redis overrides for this session. Empty overrides is valid (not 404).

query.description: Wrap modified placeholder values in a green highlight span.

request.description: Resolves full HTML and plain text using the current working copy.

item.name: 5. Tone
item.description: Evaluate emotional tone, read stored baseline scores, reevaluate single templates, and export evaluations.

request.description: Most recent tone evaluation from template_tone_evaluations (offline pipeline). Returns 200 with null emotions when none stored.

Runs GoEmotions on the resolved template text. Body is optional (top_n defaults to 5).

Response includes `plain_text` (the extracted input used for scoring), `plain_text_length`, `emotions`, `evaluated_from`, and optional `warning`.

Session-independent reevaluation for a single template. Resolves the template graph, scores with GoEmotions, upserts top-3 emotions to `template_tone_evaluations` (EN/SKRILL), and returns the result.

404 if template not found. 503 if GoEmotions model is not loaded.

Response: `{ template_name, emotions, model, evaluated_at, warning }`. The `_warning` sentinel is never included in `emotions` — it appears only in the top-level `warning` field (e.g. `no_meaningful_text`, `unresolvable_keys`).

Download all stored tone evaluations as CSV (default format). Columns: NAME, SUBJECT, SUMMARY, TONE_1, SCORE_1, TONE_2, SCORE_2, TONE_3, SCORE_3, WARNING.

Only templates with a stored evaluation row (EN/SKRILL) are included. Subject placeholders (`##...##`) are resolved via the graph when possible.
Download all stored tone evaluations as an Excel (.xlsx) file. Same columns as the CSV export.

item.name: 6. Chat (SSE)
item.description: Natural-language agent interaction. Responses are Server-Sent Events — Postman shows the raw stream.

request.description:
Streams tool, token, final, wc_updated, and error events.

Example SSE lines:
`data: {"type":"tool","name":"..."}`
`data: {"type":"token","text":"..."}`
`data: {"type":"final","text":"...","diff":null}`

If suggest_tone_rewrite ran, final event includes a diff with pending suggestions.
Catalog-wide read-only agent. session_id is optional — a transient session is created when omitted.

item.name: 7. Apply Tone Suggestions
item.description: Write pending suggestions from the last suggest_tone_rewrite call to Redis.

request.description: Applies all pending suggestions from ADK session state. Run after a chat turn that produced a diff. Empty body applies all.
Applies only the listed keys from pending suggestions.

item.name: 8. Verify After Apply
item.description: Re-read state and re-evaluate tone after applying suggestions.

request.description: Confirm overrides were written to Redis.
Preview with highlighted modified placeholders.
Re-score tone against the updated working copy.

item.name: 9. Undo Tone
item.description: Restore working copy from the pre-suggestion snapshot.

request.description: Restores all keys from the tone suggestion snapshot and clears it.
Restores only the listed keys from the snapshot.

item.name: 10. Manual Working Copy Edit
item.description: Direct Redis override without going through the agent.

request.description: Writes a single placeholder override. Key must exist in the resolution graph.

item.name: 11. Export
item.description: Download working copy as a JSON patch file.

request.description: Returns JSON with Content-Disposition attachment header.

item.name: 12. Cleanup
item.description: Delete the Redis working copy hash for this session.

request.description: Deletes the entire working copy hash. Irreversible.

item.name: 13. Template Refresh
item.description:
Background re-extraction from StrongMail. Jobs run asynchronously — poll status or stream SSE progress.

Requires server env: `STRONGMAIL_PASSWORD`, `DATABASE_URL`, `STRONGMAIL_ORG_ID`, `STRONGMAIL_USERNAME`, `REDIS_URL`.

Optional: `PIPELINE_SKIP_SUMMARY_EMBED=1` to skip embedding when AWS Bedrock is unavailable.

request.description:
Start a targeted refresh for one template. Returns `{ "job_id": "refresh-..." }` immediately.

409 if the template or a full refresh is already locked. 503 if `STRONGMAIL_PASSWORD` is unset. 404 if the template name is not in PostgreSQL.
Poll job status without SSE. Returns job_id, type, target, status (pending|running|done|failed), started_at, finished_at, error.

Stream real-time progress events. Replays buffered history, then polls until `job_done` or `job_failed`.

Example SSE line:
`data: {"type":"step_start","step":"fetch_template_body","message":"...","timestamp":"..."}`

Canonical template steps: resolve_linked_blocks, fetch_template_body, fetch_content_blocks, fetch_dynamic_rules, evaluate_tone, embed_summary.
List all pending or running refresh jobs. Returns `{ "jobs": [ { job_id, type, target, status, started_at }, ... ] }`.

Start a full database refresh (all templates, blocks, rules, tones, embeddings). Long-running — use status/SSE to monitor.

409 if any refresh job is already active. 503 if credentials are missing.

item.name: 14. Tone Batch Operations
item.description:
Batch reevaluation of all templates with EN/SKRILL tone evaluations. Jobs run asynchronously on the shared refresh thread pool — poll status or stream SSE progress.

Requires server env: `DATABASE_URL`, `REDIS_URL`, and GoEmotions loaded.

Only one batch tone job may run at a time (`tone-lock:batch`). Tone batch locks are isolated from refresh locks.

request.description:
Start a batch tone reevaluation for all templates with a `template_details` row. Returns `202 Accepted` with `{ "job_id": "tone-...", "status": "pending" }`.

409 if a batch job is already running: `{ "job_id": null, "status": "blocked", "locked_by": "tone-..." }`.

503 if GoEmotions model is not loaded or `DATABASE_URL` is unset.
Poll batch tone job status without SSE. Returns job_id, status (pending|running|done|failed), started_at, finished_at, error.

Stream real-time batch tone progress events. Replays buffered history, then polls until `job_done` or `job_failed`.

Steps: load_templates → resolve_and_evaluate (item_done per template) → store_results → job_done.

Example SSE line:
`data: {"type":"item_done","step":"resolve_and_evaluate","message":"Evaluated 'TEMPLATE_NAME'","count":1,"total":726,"timestamp":"..."}`
List all pending or running tone batch jobs. Returns `{ "jobs": [ { job_id, status, started_at }, ... ] }`.
